prompt: A lone figure stands at the centre of a vast circular crowd. Every other person in the crowd is visibly connected — hands clasped, arms around shoulders, gazes locked across the space — a dense web of human connection radiating outward. But every connection arc bypasses the central figure. Their hands hang at their sides. The crowd does not ignore them — they simply are not part of the web. Surreal, painterly, warm golden light. Photorealistic with a dreamlike quality. No text, no numbers, no labels.
visual_logic: A central figure surrounded by a crowd where every connection arc links others but bypasses them — embodying the structural truth that your neighbours are always more connected than you.
